data.content:
Implementation complete on origin/main of both repos.

Artifact: branch main on both repos (shipped directly — no PR workflow per repo conventions).

Knots commits (github.com/acartine/knots):
- fbfe76f — docs: reframe lease as declared source of agent identity
  Rewrites docs/leases.md "Agent identity propagation" section and README.md paragraph to describe lease as the declared source of identity for a claim (not a fallback).
- b8b9759 — lease: stamp agent identity from lease; deprecate per-command flags
  New helpers in src/write_dispatch/helpers.rs: warn_deprecated_agent_metadata, lease_state_actor, state_actor_from_agent_info, supplied_agent_flag_names. All identity sinks (execute_next, execute_rollback, execute_claim, execute_poll_claim, execute_gate_evaluate, execute_step_annotate, execute_state, build_note_input, build_handoff_input) derive identity from lease only. CLI help strings prefixed [DEPRECATED — IGNORED]. 9 new tests in tests_lease_deprecation.rs.
- d5ecb30 — lease: fix singular wording in deprecation warning
  "--flag is deprecated" / "this value is ignored" for single-flag; plural preserved for 2+.

Foolery commits (github.com/acartine/foolery):
- c2756326 — docs: describe lease as declared source of agent identity
  Adds docs/knots-agent-identity-contract.md, updates docs/adr-knots-compatibility.md row.
- d23064d2 — knots: stop passing agent identity flags outside lease create
  claimKnot/pollKnot/appendNoteArgs/appendHandoffArgs no longer push --agent-*/--note-*/--handoff-* flags; hardcoded "foolery" default removed; KnotUpdateInput agent fields dropped; callers in execution-backend-helpers.ts, backends/knots-backend-prompts.ts, execution-backend.ts cleaned up.
- 68a3a881 — knots tests: assert deprecated agent flags are absent
  Existing test assertions flipped; new positive-path tests for claim/poll/update/handoff.

Quality gates:
- Knots: cargo fmt, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test (1111 unit + all integration + 9 deprecation tests), coverage 95.14% (repo min 95%).
- Foolery: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2734 passed), bun run build — all green.

Live smoke tests (real release binary against a test repo):
- V1 (lease identity on step_history): lease agent_info stamped on every step.
- V2 (bogus --agent-* ignored, warning emitted): step_history carried lease identity, not "bogus".
- V3 (no-lease + --agent-name, warning with "no lease bound" branch): exact three-line warning produced.
- Singular vs plural grammar verified live post-d5ecb30.
- V4 covered by tests_lease_deprecation (all sinks).

Not yet done — require downstream activity:
- V5/V6: need a Knots release containing these commits on the host running Foolery, so the installed kno stamps step_history before Foolery's Retakes screen consumes it.
- AC6 verified-in-binary: the fresh binary's kno claim/kno poll prompts use only --actor-kind agent in the completion command. Confirmed on knots-5923 (the lease issued for this knot's implementation claim).
